title: FLOSS Weekly 239: Concrete CMS
summary:
Concrete5 is an easy to edit CMS designed to serve the relationship between site developers and site owners. Concrete5 makes running a website easy. Go to any page in your site, and a editing toolbar gives you all the controls you need to update your website. No intimidating manuals, no complicated administration interfaces - just point and click.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly.
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future. Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com.
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast, and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
